## Validation.validateIdsWithPreferred() function

Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in the ids array.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function validateIdsWithPreferred<TId extends string>(collection: IIdsWithPreferred<TId>, context?: string): Result<IIdsWithPreferred<TId>>;
```
